Partnered with product and engineering teams to deliver high-impact POCs and reference architectures, providing technical insights that influenced roadmap priorities and proved differentiated platform value to engineering and executive audiences.

Scaled team leverage through AI-driven automation, building an internal AI agent and instrumenting planning workflows to **cut cycle time 39%** and increase drill capacity by 21% across distributed infrastructure environments.
